visual-anti-patterns.notes: Purple-to-blue gradient background dominates the landing hero; body text in gallery metadata and environment labels appears below 16px

visual-child-friendly.notes: Large tappable object tiles, playful emoji-rich tone, AI buddy with simple suggestion chips; builder has moderate panel density that could overwhelm younger children

visual-consistency.notes: Typography and card radii are consistent, but button colors drift across pages (orange landing CTA, purple gallery CTA, dark Save, orange Send) and gallery background differs from builder

visual-accessibility.notes: Good text-on-light contrast throughout, visible selection rings on object tiles and active environment chips, text labels on most buttons; undo/redo nav icons lack text labels, no responsive/mobile evidence
